overallInterpretation: The screenshot shows a 3D scene with a dark navy background containing three main objects: a yellow sphere, a blue box, and a large dark green quad acting as a mirror. Inside the green mirror quad, smaller reflected versions of the blue box and yellow sphere are visible. A smaller dark rectangle within the mirror reflection appears to be a second-level recursive mirror, containing tiny further reflections. This demonstrates at least two levels of recursive reflection as described in the expected output. The scene composition matches the expectation: main camera sees yellow sphere, blue box, and green mirror quad, with recursive reflections inside the mirror.

artifacts.interpretation: A 3D rendered scene on a dark navy background. In the foreground: a blue cube (lower-left of center) and a yellow sphere (center-right). Behind them is a large dark green quadrilateral (the mirror surface). Within the mirror, smaller reflected copies of the blue cube and yellow sphere are visible (upper-left area of the mirror). A smaller dark rectangle inside the mirror contains what appear to be even tinier reflections, representing a second level of recursion. The recursive reflections are small but discernible, confirming at least two levels of mirror recursion.
